name: Sgh Limited
analysis: SGH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$43.0400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$43.6300, stop A$39.6891, target A$48.7614 (1.30:1) — then trail it.
